articles.title: On the frontline in battle against searing heat

articles.title: Watch ‘epic’ moment three whales jump in unison
articles.description: A man in the US has filmed three humpback whales breaching in almost perfect synchronisation off the coast of Massachusetts.
articles.content: A man in the US has caught the moment three whales breached...
